en.title: Action Plan
en.prompt: I want to enhance my [SKILL] through a personalized 30-day learning plan. As an aspiring [Beginner/Advanced learner] who is eager to continuously improve, I would like you to assist me in creating a customized learning roadmap to help me master this skill effectively. Please provide detailed guidance and suggestions in your response below, including specific learning goals, daily learning tasks, relevant learning resources, and a method to assess progress. I aim to achieve optimal learning outcomes during these 30 days.
en.remark: Not only applicable to creating study plans but also useful for exercise, reading, work, and other areas. Contributed by @ScenerorSun.

related.title: High schoolers' essay
related.remark: The article produced by this prompt reflects the writing style of Chinese middle school students. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

related.title: Four-layered Structure Induction
related.remark: Multi-level summarization and induction can be used to explain words and phrases and make associations with the article. The Chinese version of this prompt has better effect. Contributed by @ergf991.

metaDescription: Want to improve? Get a personalized 30-day roadmap for any skill. Includes goals, daily tasks, and progress checks. Try it now.

faq.a: Often yes. The AI assumes you have 1-2 hours to study daily without accounting for energy fluctuations or other commitments. Trim 30-40 percent of the content based on reality and leave buffer days. Sustainable beats forcing 100 percent completion.

Yes, but state your current level clearly. At the start say "already mastered A / B / C, unfamiliar with D / E, want to reach the point of independently doing F." Just saying "advanced" gets generic advanced paths that don't target your weaknesses, much lower efficiency.
